message:
refactor(tests): Replace `as` casts with safe numeric conversions

Eliminates clippy warnings about precision loss and implicit casts by
introducing explicit conversion helpers that validate value ranges.

Key changes:
- Add u64_to_f64() and usize_to_f64() helpers in coverage.rs that go
  through u32 as an intermediate type with explicit bounds checking
- Extract CancelMetrics struct from inline test code with proper
  average_chain_depth() calculation using safe conversions
- Use write! macro instead of format! + push_str for report generation
  to avoid intermediate allocations
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] where appropriate rather than
  artificially splitting test logic

These changes ensure the test infrastructure compiles cleanly under
stricter clippy configurations without changing test behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
